label: CIS Safeguard 17.9
title: Establish and Maintain Security Incident Thresholds

prose.en: Establish and maintain security incident thresholds, including, at a minimum, differentiating between an incident and an event. Examples can include: abnormal activity, security vulnerability, security weakness, data breach, privacy incident, etc. Review annually, or when significant enterprise changes occur that could impact this Safeguard.
Security incident thresholds are established and maintained, including, at a minimum, differentiating between an incident and an event.
Review security incident thresholds annually, or when significant enterprise changes occur that could impact this Safeguard.

example.en: Examples can include: abnormal activity, security vulnerability, security weakness, data breach, privacy incident, etc.
